2243380.name: Ugano-Game
2243380.description:
Ugano-Game


Ugano Game is an violent free, fantasy-penguin, 3D-open world game, we developed for 3 years.

We have two playmodes, “network hangout” and a “singleplayer story mode” to play alone.

The player can walk, crouch, jump, run, slide, paraglide and swim through this world.

Our open game world is based on a real Island at Antarctica.

In the single player mode, the player can engage in missions alongside 10+ non-player characters, accept quests, and explore a vast map spanning 20 square kilometers filled with enemies and interactive objects. In multiplayer mode, the player can team up with up to 7 other players to participate in games such as Capture the Flag, All vs All Deathmatch, and Team vs Team Snowball Fight

英语*
